who: insurance brokers managing 10-20 claims per month
offer: For insurance brokers processing 10-20 claims/month, missed policy changes cause delayed claims approvals. We monitor policy changes and flag exceptions instead of manual tracking of policy changes through emails and documents.
problem: Inability to track policy changes leads to missed exceptions in claims processing.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance brokers
Share insights on Indie Hackers forums
Direct message 20-50 brokers with demo video
Engage in community groups for insurance tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of policy changes and exceptions
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Store common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Enable CSV import for existing policy data
Streamline onboarding process for new users
